Package com.stevenlagoy.presidency.characters.attributes.names

  • Field Details

    • multipleFirstNamesPercent

      public static final float multipleFirstNamesPercent
      Percentage of people with multiple first names. Percentage for three first names is this value squared, and so on.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • middleNamePercent

      public static final float middleNamePercent
      Percentage of people who have one or more middle names.
      See Also:

      Percentage of people with multiple middle names. Percentage for three middle names is this value squared, and so on.

    • selectNickname

      public String selectNickname(Demographics demographics, String... names)

    • selectNickname

      public String selectNickname(Demographics demographics, Collection<String> names)

    • selectNickname

      public String selectNickname(Collection<Bloc> blocs, String... names)

    • selectNickname

      public String selectNickname(Collection<Bloc> blocs, Collection<String> names)
      Select a nickname given blocs and a collection of names.
      Parameters:
      blocs - Blocs to possibly choose another name or nickname based on.
      names - Given (first or middle) names to possibly choose a nickname based on.
      Returns:
      String semi-random nickname which may or may not be based on the passed names. May be empty if none of the names have a known nickname.

    • generateName

      public Name generateName(Demographics demographics)

    • getGivenNamesDistribution

      public Map<Set<Bloc>,Map<String,Double>> getGivenNamesDistribution()

    • getGivenNamesDistribution

      public Map<String,Double> getGivenNamesDistribution(Bloc... blocs)
      Return the given names distribution for a person who is a member of all the passed blocs.
      Parameters:
      blocs - Any number of blocs. This set will be refined and as many as possible will be covered.
      Returns:
      Map of names to weights.

    • getGivenNamesDistribution

      public Map<String,Double> getGivenNamesDistribution(Demographics demographics)

    • getGivenNamesDistribution

      public Map<String,Double> getGivenNamesDistribution(Collection<Bloc> blocs)
      Return the given names distribution for a person who is a member of all the passed blocs.
      Parameters:
      blocs - Any number of blocs. This set will be refined and as many as possible will be covered.
      Returns:
      Map of names to weights.

    • getNicknames

      public Map<String,List<String>> getNicknames()

    • getNicknamesFor

      public List<String> getNicknamesFor(String fullname)
      Get all known nicknames for the given full name.
      Parameters:
      fullname - Full name for which to get all nicknames.
      Returns:
      List of all known nicknames.
      See Also:
      • getNicknameFor(String)

    • getNicknameFor

      public String getNicknameFor(String fullname)
      Get one randomly selected nickname for the given full name.
      Parameters:
      fullname - Full name for which to choose a nickname.
      Returns:
      One randomly selected nickname.
      See Also:
      • getNicknamesFor(String)

      public core.JSONObject toJson()

    • fromJson

      public Manager fromJson(core.JSONObject json)
      Description copied from interface: Jsonic
      Interpret a JSONObject into an object of this type.
      Parameters:
      json - A JSONObject containing any number of the fields for this object as key-value pairs.
      Returns:
      The Object interpreted from the Json. Note that this object's fields will also be set.
